## Checklist

- [ ] H1 matches `title` in frontmatter
- [ ] All required body sections present and in order (`What & why`, `Scoring`, `Steps`, `References`, optionally `How Forter helps`)
- [ ] `forterApplies` and `How Forter helps` are in sync
- [ ] Every `#guideline-M-N` cross-reference points to an existing guideline
- [ ] References include at least one canonical source per claim
